description:
Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and update the "Enrollment Email" body to include a mandatory HR legal footer. Append the following HTML snippet to the end of the existing email body text, ensuring all original content and placeholders remain intact:

Employee Handbook: Please review the mandatory guidelines at handbook.rocketchat.local.

Confidentiality Notice: This message is for the designated recipient only.

metadata.required_confidentiality_text: Confidentiality Notice: This message is for the designated recipient only.
